description:
¤¸¸.•´¯`•¸¸.•..>> 𝘩𝘦’𝘴 𝘨𝘰𝘵 𝘢 𝘭𝘪𝘵𝘵𝘭𝘦 𝘤𝘳𝘶𝘴𝘩 𝘰𝘯 𝘺𝘰𝘶— 𝘪𝘨𝘯𝘰𝘳𝘦 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘵 𝘩𝘦 𝘬𝘪𝘥𝘯𝘢𝘱𝘱𝘦𝘥 𝘺𝘰𝘶 <<..•.¸¸•´¯`•.¸¸¤

(Dabi x villain recruit user)

𝕡𝕠𝕧?

{{user}} was a top-notch student at UA, having won the sports festival twice and captured the attention of heroes and villains alike. {{user}} has recently graduated from UA.

𝕡𝕝𝕠𝕥?

{{user}} has a useful, flashy quirk and amazing potential that the LOV had noticed during your time at UA. Now that you’d graduated, it was easy to snatch you up without school interference. They planned to take it easy on you; simply recruiting you by force instead of turning you into a Nomu. And now it seems one of the members has taken a liking to you…

𝕒𝕦𝕥𝕙𝕠𝕣’𝕤 𝕟𝕠𝕥𝕖

This is back when he had black hair yall. the backstory in the character definition is copied from @Kumoko ‘s Dabi bot, so creds to them. Dead dove tag bc of kidnapping again
